2603.18353.title: Interpretability without actionability: mechanistic methods cannot correct language model errors despite near-perfect internal representations
2603.18353.paper_summary: Language models encode task-relevant knowledge in internal representations that far exceeds their output performance, but whether mechanistic interpretability methods can bridge this knowledge-action gap has not been systematically tested. We compared four mechanistic interpretability methods -- concept bottleneck steering (Steerling-8B), sparse autoencoder feature steering, logit lens with activation patching, and linear probing with truthfulness separator vector steering (Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct) -- for correcting false-negative triage errors using 400 physician-adjudicated clinical vignettes (144 hazards, 256 benign). Linear probes discriminated hazardous from benign cases with 98.2% AUROC, yet the model's output sensitivity was only 45.1%, a 53-percentage-point knowledge-action gap. Concept bottleneck steering corrected 20% of missed hazards but disrupted 53% of correct detections, indistinguishable from random perturbation (p=0.84). SAE feature steering produced zero effect despite 3,695 significant features. TSV steering at high strength corrected 24% of missed hazards while disrupting 6% of correct detections, but left 76% of errors uncorrected. Current mechanistic interpretability methods cannot reliably translate internal knowledge into corrected outputs, with implications for AI safety frameworks that assume interpretability enables effective error correction.
2603.18353.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型在內部表示中編碼與任務相關的知識，這些知識遠超過它們的輸出性能，但機械解釋方法是否能彌合這一知識與行動之間的差距尚未經過系統性測試。我們比較了四種機械解釋方法——概念瓶頸引導（Steerling-8B）、稀疏自編碼器特徵引導、帶有激活修補的邏輯透鏡，以及使用真實性分隔向量引導的線性探測（Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct）——以糾正使用400個醫生裁定的臨床小插曲（144個危險、256個良性）的假陰性分流錯誤。線性探測以98.2%的AUROC區分危險與良性案例，但模型的輸出靈敏度僅為45.1%，知識與行動之間存在53個百分點的差距。概念瓶頸引導糾正了20%的漏檢危險，但擾亂了53%的正確檢測，與隨機擾動無法區分（p=0.84）。儘管有3,695個顯著特徵，SAE特徵引導產生了零效果。高強度的TSV引導糾正了24%的漏檢危險，同時擾亂了6%的正確檢測，但仍有76%的錯誤未被糾正。目前的機械解釋方法無法可靠地將內部知識轉化為糾正的輸出，這對假設可解釋性能夠有效糾正錯誤的AI安全框架有重要影響。
2603.18353.author: Sanjay Basu et.al.
2603.18353.authors: Sanjay Basu, Sadiq Y. Patel, Parth Sheth, Bhairavi Muralidharan, Namrata Elamaran, Aakriti Kinra, John Morgan, Rajaie Batniji
